content.problemStatement: You are given an array **A** of size **N**. Output the maximum value of **A[i]**%**A[j]** (ie. **A[i]** mod **A[j]**) over all **1 ≤ i, j ≤ N**.
content.inputFormat:
First line of input contains **T**, the number of testcases.

The first line of each test case contains **N**, the number of elements in the array.

Second line of each testcase contains **N** space separated integers in which the ith integer is **A[i]**.
content.outputFormat: For each testcase output a single integer in a new line: the maximum value of **A[i]**%A**[j]**.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The maximum value is obtained by 1%2 = 1.
